trigger_queries.query: I need to investigate why the delegation system is failing. Route me to the right skills.
assertions: Notes research overlap: hm-detective available if investigation needed

trigger_queries.query: Load skills for implementing phase 5 of the authentication module.
assertions: Adds hm-cross-cutting-change if touching multiple layers

trigger_queries.query: We need to run TDD on the new feature and validate against quality gates.
assertions: Provides loading order: test-driven-execution first, then gate-orchestrator

trigger_queries.query: Create a new skill for managing WebSocket connections.
assertions: Detects meta-builder intent (signal: 'create a new skill')
Routes to hf-meta-builder instead of hm-* skills
Does NOT load any hm-* skill bundle
Explains boundary: hm-lineage-router handles product-dev tasks only

trigger_queries.query: Research the latest authentication patterns and plan the implementation for our system.
I need to research, plan, implement, test, debug, and review the entire authentication system.
assertions: Detects 6 categories in a single task
Refuses to load all 6 bundles (would exceed 5-skill limit)
Suggests routing order: Research → Planning → Execution → Quality → Debug → Review

rich_source_evidence.evidence: SKILL.md defines 6 categories with 2-3 skills each. Max 5 per bundle enforced by Iron Law.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Multiple routing strategies for task classification
rich_source_evidence.evidence: Single-category routing, multi-category resolution (primary + secondary add), 3+ category split.
6 bundles × 2-3 skills = 13 skill references + 4 consumer skills in Cross-References table.
6-step routing protocol. Multi-category decision tree. Exclusion rules table.
SKILL.md (routing map + loading rules) + references/routing-map.md (detailed signal tables, multi-category combos, exclusion rules).

rich_source_evidence.claim: Works across project types and task scales
rich_source_evidence.evidence: Category-based routing adapts to any project. Multi-category resolution handles complex tasks. 5-skill limit prevents overload.
Self-correction documents 4 anti-patterns. Multi-category limit honestly documented.
6 eval scenarios. metrics/rich-gate-scorecard.md with D1-D8 scoring.
